TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ron_Bonham, title = Ron_Bonham, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ron_Bonham} }

S.FORM: Ron Bonham sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Ron Bonham, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ron Bonham sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Ron Bonham, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ron βonħam s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ron βonħam, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
